title: Take a Peek
excerpt: Richard from American Crafts was on a local news channel in Utah showing some behind-the-scenes peeks at how some of our Sketchbook papers were created. He also shows the style sheet for an upcoming summer release. http://www.ksl.com/video/we.php?v=19228671.mp4 Thanks for all…
body:
Richard from American Crafts was on a local news channel in Utah showing some behind-the-scenes peeks at how some of our Sketchbook papers were created. He also shows the style sheet for an upcoming summer release.

http://www.ksl.com/video/we.php?v=19228671.mp4

Thanks for all your continuous kind words about Sketchbook. SO excited to have made Scrapbook Update's CHA Top 10 list. WOW, totally honored and humbled. Although it pains me to wait to see it in stores, it should be available at the end of March, which is just over a month away.

If you've taken any of my online classes or have thought about scrapbooking-on-the-go, well this is a kit you probably don't want to miss. Tomorrow at 9am PST I will list these travel kits on my website (in very limited quantities). Here's a peek...
